input: Mashup-API composition network (bipartite graph) with service functional content
output: low-dimensional vector representations for each service (Mashup or API)
loss: not specified (unsupervised embedding; downstream tasks use classification/clustering loss)
key_idea: combine probabilistic topic model for link prediction with GCN-based message passing to encode both structure and content
datasets: two real-world Web service datasets (not named in abstract)
